## Type

- [ ] New design rule
- [ ] Component / pattern
- [ ] Motion (seed / keyword move)

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the Golden Rules in `engine/CLAUDE.md` (content in cards, one accent, no `#000`, 2:1 numbers, `space-y-6` rhythm)
- [ ] If it touches UI, I ran `/ss-review` (or eyeballed it against `DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md`)
- [ ] No hardcoded hex where a semantic token exists
- [ ] Counts/docs updated if I added a component, skin, skill, or motion keyword
